metadata.description: Make your clanker your investing analyst: a personal research companion that learns your edges and stress-tests ideas against the investing canon.

plugins.name: cupel
plugins.description: Personal investing research companion. /cupel onboard, watch, scout, assay, crux, premortem, allocate, pulse, brief — learns your edges (Lynch) and keeps you honest. Gives caveated, scenario-based calls with the risks named; never invents numbers or places trades.
